extracted.title: Columbia Pipelines February 2026 Monthly Customer Update – Today, Feb. 19, 1:30 PM CST
extracted.description:
PLEASE JOIN US today for the Columbia Pipelines February 2026 Monthly Customer Update at 2:30 p.m. EST, 1:30 p.m. CST.

The Teams Meeting link and Presentation is included below. Customers may follow along using Microsoft Teams or may call in using a dial-in number and the posted presentation.

February 2026 TC Energy - Columbia Pipelines Monthly Customer Update and CGT Maintenance Timeline Call | Meeting-Join | Microsoft Teams
https://teams.microsoft.com/l/meetup-join/19%3ameeting_NTJiZTk3ZTAtYmEwOC00ZDc0LTgxMTQtMGU0MGI0Y2JhZDFh%40thread.v2/0?context=%7b%22Tid%22%3a%22b0cee36c-225c-4f48-b60b-921f444b5698%22%2c%22Oid%22%3a%22e9fab795-6800-442a-aa7d-55d661bd0d8f%22%7d

You may also dial-in using the following:
Phone: (213) 607-0501
Passcode: 833 491 62#

Please contact your Customer Services Representative with any questions.

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Presentations:
Columbia Pipelines Monthly Customer Update 02_19_2026.pdf
